_comment:
Render-only sprite-pack catalog. Each entry names a master/<name>/ pack folder (cards reference it via `object: { name: <name>, index?: "<lut-symbol>" }` and `texture: { name: <name> }`). Flat — no inheritance, no recipe semantics. `aspects.json` is the parallel catalog for recipe tags; the two catalogs share names where they overlap (a card carrying aspect `pine` auto-resolves to the object also named `pine`), but they are NOT the same registry — objects can exist without an aspect (`requisite`, `dust`, `workbench`), and aspects can exist without an object (`wood`, `fire`, `corpus`).

Each entry MUST declare `size` (the native pixel size of the master art). `scale` (random scale envelope) defaults to `{min:1.0, max:1.0}` when omitted; `anchor` (sprite pivot) defaults to `{x:0.5, y:0.5}`.

`textures` (optional) is the per-pack LUT mapping symbolic texture names → on-disk `<N>.png` indices. Cards reference textures by symbol (`object.index: "log"`), the parser resolves through here at build time. If sprites in a pack get re-numbered, only this map needs updating — card defs are untouched.
